flags.message: Corpus query sidecar unreachable this run (fedcourts query -> 'corpus service at http://127.0.0.1:8377 is unreachable ... timed out'), so no ranked similar priors informed this cell; prediction rests on the committed statpack, the provisioned inputs, and 4 CourtListener MCP calls. Not blocking, but if the sidecar was expected to be up for this fan-out, other cells in run 20260717T180352Z likely hit the same outage. Separately: the predict prompt directs predictors to the statpack's 'Segment base rate by salience band' table, but the committed statpack.md/json carries no such section.
